basic_details.job_title: DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Tirupathur (DCPU Tirupathur)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Tirupathur has released the official Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) Notification 2026. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 42 years of age with a Post Graduate degree in Social Work/ Sociology/ Child Development/ Human Rights/ Public Administration/ Psychology/ Psychiatry/ Law/ Public Health/ Community Resource Management or a Graduate degree in the relevant discipline with 2 years of experience and proficiency in computers can apply offline

qualification.education_qualification: MSW, M.Sc, M.A, LLM, MPH, B.Sc, B.A, LLB, BSW
qualification.details: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University OR Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation/implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development/Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tirupathur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Tirupathur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Vacancy Details 2026
DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University OR Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Child Development/Human Rights/Public Administration/Psychology/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health/Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation/implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development/Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://tirupathur.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) posts is 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree or a Graduate degree with 2 years of experience in relevant fields such as Social Work, Sociology, Child Development, Law, Psychology, etc., from a recognized university. Proficiency in computers is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post is 42 years. No specific minimum age limit has been mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) position by the District Child Protection Unit Tirupathur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,804 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for DCPU Tirupathur Protection Officer jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post involves two main stages: Application Screening and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District Child Protection Unit Tirupathur (DCPU Tirupathur).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Tirupathur, which is https://tirupathur.nic.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
